title: World Cup will kick demand higher than ever
snippet:
Grid expects 60% more demand across World Cup 2026 especially during England and Scotland matches

The post World Cup will kick demand higher than ever appeared first on
ai_summary: Highlights demand peaks during World Cup 2026, relevant to understanding grid demand patterns and potential wholesale price movements that affect tem's trading and customer offtake.
ai_reasoning: Background reading on demand forecasting and grid dynamics. Useful context for wholesale market outlook but no immediate strategic action required.
